case_title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. SHANNON LEIGH GAINES et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 - UNIT 55, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL SERVED MAR-12-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH

DECLARATION RE: HOLDOVER DAMAGES AND RENT VALUE IS $39.28 PER DAY. DECLARATION RE: ALL AGREEMENTS ARE MADE ORALLY. NO OTHER WRITTEN AGREEMENT IS IN POSSESSION OF THE LANDLORD AND/OR ITS AGENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GAINES, SHANNON LEIGH
